meta.title: Claude Code Feature Overview — A User's Perspective
meta.description: Claude Code Feature Overview: From v0.2.21 to v2.1.71, 220+ versions and 1000+ updates fully documented. Covering AI models, multi-Agent collaboration, MCP ecosystem, terminal experience, security sandbox, and more.
meta.keywords: Claude Code, Anthropic, AI Programming, Agent, MCP, CLI, VS Code, SDK
meta.ogTitle: Claude Code Feature Overview — Complete Evolution from v0.2 to v2.1
meta.ogDescription: 220+ versions, 1000+ updates. From terminal to IDE, from solo coding to multi-Agent collaboration — discover every capability of Claude Code.

recent.label: 🔥 Recent Highlights
recent.title: Latest Features
recent.subtitle: v2.1.58 — v2.1.71: /loop scheduled commands, customizable voice keys, startup freeze fixes, VS Code major upgrades — Claude Code keeps evolving.

models.label: ◆ AI Models & Reasoning
models.title: Your AI Partner, Stronger & Faster
models.subtitle: From Opus 4.6 deep reasoning to Fast Mode instant output — choose the right model for the task.

agents.label: ◆ Multi-Agent Collaboration
agents.title: A One-Person Team, Multiple Agents in Parallel
agents.subtitle: Agent Teams let multiple AIs work simultaneously: one analyzes security, one optimizes performance, one writes tests.

sessions.label: ◆ Sessions & Memory
sessions.title: Conversations Persist, Memory Carries On
sessions.subtitle: Auto-memory, session resume, fork, summary — every conversation has context.

devflow.label: ◆ Developer Workflow
devflow.title: From Code to PR, All in One Flow
devflow.subtitle: Git integration, PR status tracking, task management, PDF reading — full development lifecycle coverage.

mcp.label: ◆ MCP Ecosystem
mcp.title: Infinite Extensions, Connect Everything
mcp.subtitle: Model Context Protocol connects Claude Code to Slack, GitHub, databases, and any external service.

terminal.label: ◆ Terminal Experience
terminal.title: The Ultimate Terminal Experience
terminal.subtitle: Themes, syntax highlighting, CJK support, Vim mode — every detail polished.

security.label: ◆ Security & Sandbox
security.title: Security by Design
security.subtitle: Sandbox isolation, tiered permissions, command injection protection — defense at every layer.

sdk.label: ◆ SDK & Integrations
sdk.title: More Than a CLI, It's a Dev Platform
sdk.subtitle: SDK, Desktop app, OpenTelemetry, Output Styles — Claude Code is a complete developer platform.

performance.label: ◆ Performance
performance.title: Faster Startup, Less Memory
performance.subtitle: From startup to long sessions, every aspect is continuously optimized.

platform.label: ◆ Cross-Platform
platform.title: Windows, macOS, Linux — All Covered
platform.subtitle: From Windows ARM64 to RHEL 8, from WSL2 to NFS filesystems.

vscode.label: ◆ VS Code Integration
vscode.title: Claude in Your IDE
vscode.subtitle: Not just a terminal tool — the VS Code extension brings Claude into your IDE workflow.

shortcuts.label: ◆ Shortcuts & Commands
shortcuts.title: Power Tools for Keyboard Warriors
shortcuts.subtitle: Every action has a shortcut, every feature has a slash command.

timeline.label: ◆ Version Timeline
timeline.title: From v0.2 to v2.1, Complete Evolution
timeline.subtitle: Key milestones at a glance.
